title: Loop pipeline and unroll basics
route: Use after correctness when latency or II is loop-bound and memory bandwidth is sufficient.
summary: Pipeline the innermost profitable loop first; unroll only when dependencies and memory ports allow it, and keep trip counts/resource growth bounded.
anti_patterns: do not unroll memory-port-limited loops blindly
do not optimize before CSIM passes
risk: Can fail II or inflate LUT/DSP/BRAM when dependencies are ignored.
